title: Parsnip Jalebi
description: A nutty and gooey Indian Chettinad dish featuring chopped parsley, a nostalgic twist for those who enjoy the jalebi dessert but with a new flavor profile.

ingredients.name: parsnip
ingredients.notes: ensure it is firm and white

instructions: Wash and peel the parsnip. Cut into thin slices.
Soak flour in water until it forms a thick batter, adding salt to taste.
Pour the batter into hot oil prepared for deep-frying or use ghee for shallow-frying, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry until golden brown and crisp. Remove from heat and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
In a large bowl, mix parsnip slices with sugar syrup, chopped parsley, and almond slivers/pistachio nuts thoroughly.
Serve warm as a dessert or snack, garnished with additional chopped fresh herbs if desired.
